---
title: "Overview"
image: man/figures/vignette-knowledge-evolution.svg
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _pages-nav.qmd >}}

Track the evolution of the knowledge base: wiki pages, raw sources, confidence levels, and topic connections.

## Current Snapshot

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3}
### Wiki Pages
```{r}
#| results: asis
if (!is.null(latest)) {
  n <- latest |> filter(category == "wiki", item == "all", metric == "page_count") |> pull(value)
  cat("####", n)
} else {
  cat("####", fallback_kb$n_pages)
}
```
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
### Raw Sources
```{r}
#| results: asis
if (!is.null(latest)) {
  n <- latest |> filter(category == "raw", item == "all", metric == "source_count") |> pull(value)
  cat("####", n)
} else {
  cat("####", fallback_kb$n_sources)
}
```
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
### Provenance %
```{r}
#| results: asis
if (!is.null(latest)) {
  n <- latest |> filter(category == "wiki", item == "all", metric == "provenance_pct") |> pull(value)
  cat("####", n, "%")
} else {
  cat("####", fallback_kb$provenance_pct, "%")
}
```
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
### AI-Inferred
```{r}
#| results: asis
if (!is.null(latest)) {
  n <- latest |> filter(category == "wiki", item == "all", metric == "ai_inferred_markers") |> pull(value)
  cat("####", n, "markers")
} else {
  cat("####", fallback_kb$ai_inferred, "markers")
}
```
:::

:::
